title: 30mm PULL BOW with Instruction sheet (1 Single Bow, 8. White)
features: The Bow will arrive 'Flat Packed' with ShredAstic Instruction sheet
description: ShredAstic 30mm Pull Bow Poly ribbon for hampers, Wedding Car, florist bouquets, balloons, Sweet Bouquets, Weddings, Easter, Mothers Day, Christmas, Gift Decoration.How to make a finished bow: Open the bottom of the bow to reveal two inner ribbons, hold bow with one hand & with other hand pull the inner ribbons . As you pull the inner ribbons your bow will form. When pulled sufficiently, use inner ribbons to knot and tie to secure in place. Tie to your gift and curl the two long inner ends to decorate. Please Note: due to differences in colour brightness of screens with different devices, all colours shown are indicative only.
